blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So you can't accept me?
Uorin scratched her cheek with an apologetic expression.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I'd like to help, but there are many daughters of Teraje in numerous kingdoms who are my rivals.
I am particularly young and do not want to stand out yet.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: And Kazra isn't exactly a strong foundation either.
There's no need to draw attention and become a target for my older sisters, right?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fourteen years old. That was the age of the girl sitting in front of him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'You're really something, Uorin.'
He also realized anew how ridiculous his own behavior had been a few days ago.
Even now that he understood the reality of the royal palace, it was chilling.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What kind of guts did he have before to try to deal with a woman like this?
Fine. If there's no room for negotiation, I'll leave. I need to find Amy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone stood up as if there was no need to listen further.
If his assumption was wrong, everything would spiral into the worst-case scenario, but there was nothing he could do.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Because there are no fools in the royal palace who miss the time to act no matter how great the danger.
I wish you luck.
Hearing Uorin's parting words made his heart drop.
But he walked towards the door without showing it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He must not show hesitation or fear. He had to truly let go of everything and leave this room.
Ataraxia is not needed. Is that really so?
Perhaps to Uorin, it didn't matter much.
But even if it was just a sliver of gain, people always found it hard to give away even the smallest advantage to someone else.
Shirone walked, holding on to a small hope as if it were his lifeline.
Even as his hand reached for the doorknob and began to turn it, Uorin did not respond.
The door opened, and Shirone clenched his eyes shut.
This was the end of everything.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But if perhaps...
Shirone's steps came to an abrupt halt.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If I were to make the maximum concession... that is, if we consider it as borrowing against Oppa's future...
Shirone slowly turned to look back at Uorin.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You could earn at least an opportunity to negotiate with the daughter of Teraje.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: An opportunity to negotiate?
Even if he pledged Ataraxia as collateral, all he would gain was the chance to sit at the negotiation table.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. A negotiation. I can't just help you for nothing.
Like I said earlier, I don't want to put myself in a dangerous position unnecessarily.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There's one condition. It shouldn't be a particularly difficult condition, but anyway, if you agree to this condition, I'll be on your side.
Shirone raised his chin as if to say, 'Go ahead, tell me'.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Tonight, spend the night with me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wha- What?
It was absurd for a condition put forward at the end of such an intense psychological battle.
What reason could there be for him to spend the night with her?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Don't worry. I didn't mean it that way. Just stay with me tonight.
Well... if you happen to have other ideas, I don't mind if you try.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What on earth are you saying? You're my half-sister.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Well, that's something we'll only know after the paternity test is done.
And honestly, it doesn't matter.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Same-sex marriage is common for royalty who bring a whole kingdom as a dowry.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why on earth? What does that condition have to do with helping me?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The daughters of Teraje Family have always been the ones to ascend to the emperor's throne.
It might sound strange, but for us, men are merely tools to be consumed according to their use.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: That's why a daughter of Teraje doesn't keep a man who has another woman in his heart by her side.
If Oppa is thinking of Amy, then I cannot accept you either.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I understand what you're saying. But I don't have Amy in my heart.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I think Zion Oppa is interested in her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Something hot welled up in Shirone's chest.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Of course, if she rejects him, nothing will happen.
Despite how he seems, Oppa has too much pride to force himself on a woman who turns him down.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Well then, let's do this. I just want to confirm your feelings.
From this moment on, I'll guarantee the safety of Amy and everyone else.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I could send people right now and give the order.
All you need to do is spend the night with me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone didn't know what kind of threat Amy was under that made her follow Zion, but if he accepted Uorin's offer, Amy could be saved.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Zion… Where did he take Amy?
I can't reveal that yet, not until you've made your decision.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It's very simple. You just need to trust me.
Show me that I take precedence over that woman.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A trembling that started at his fingertips spread throughout his body.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Why are you hesitating? I'm Uorin of Teraje.
Not only do I not lie, but isn't this proposal what you wanted?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: If you can prove that you don't have feelings for another woman, I'll support you wholeheartedly.
I'll spare no resources to help you grow your abilities, and when I become empress, you could become the greatest mage in the world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was truly a dream-like story for Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And she had the ability to turn that dream into reality.
Even archmages are writing resumes wanting to work under Uorin.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Such a huge opportunity was lying right before his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Lost in thought, Shirone finally made his decision.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm going to Amy. I won't be accepting your proposal.
Uorin sighed, as though frustrated.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Are you throwing away the incredible opportunity to form a connection with Teraje?
No, more than that, you could protect the family you hold so dear.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: And yet, you're willing to throw it all away over a woman?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's right. That's what I intend to do.
Uorin closed her mouth as if shocked.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: But Uorin, for humans, that's everything.
The only world that exists is the one we see and feel.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Even if you truly save Amy, if I can't see it for myself, then it's just an unrealized world.
I can't leave Amy in visible danger while trusting in some invisible safety.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's why I have to go to Amy.
Sadness briefly flickered in Uorin's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: You make life so hard for yourself.
It would be easy if you just made a choice.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone smiled bitterly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He often thought the same thing himself.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But that's precisely the shackle of intellect. Once you know something, you can't act as if you don't.
I understand how great this opportunity was.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I also know how much you, the heir to the emperor, conceded to help me.
I'm not doubting you at all.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But I have to go.
Uorin walked up to Shirone and hugged him, burying her face against his chest.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: You're such a fool, Oppa.
I'm sorry I couldn't do anything for you.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Personally, I really liked you.
I hope good fortune follows your future.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Then, stepping back a couple of steps, she revealed the information Shirone wanted to know.
Go to the gallery. It's the only place where you can avoid people's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It's also the place Oppa takes women when he wants to seduce them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As he readied himself to leave, Uorin pulled something out of her pocket.
Wait a moment. Take this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone caught the small object Uorin threw.
He opened his hand to find a glowing red orb.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is...?
It's the price for El Crouch's porcelain doll.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It should be worth at least 100 million.
No, I really meant for that to be a gift...

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: But reason and emotion are separate matters.
Now that negotiations have broken down, I can't be indebted to you, can I?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright. I'll use it well when I graduate later.
Shirone put the orb in his pocket and walked to the door.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then he suddenly stopped and looked back at Uorin.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thinking about it, he had received a lot of help from her.
At the dinner table, she had upheld his parents' dignity and supported his claim to attend magic academy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In the gallery, she had introduced him to the Objet, and at the Colosseum, she had helped him understand the true nature of the royal palace.
And now, as payment for the porcelain doll, she had provided him with escape funds.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In a situation where he was being pursued by the royal palace, 100 million gold would be of great help.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thank you, for everything, from the beginning to now.
Thinking about it, if it weren't for you, I wouldn't have made it this far.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Huhu, even in hell, there's water to drink.
Uorin answered with Kazra's proverb.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha! That makes sense.
Realizing the situation he was in, Shirone let out a hollow laugh as he left Zion's room.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Phew.
Once the door closed, Uorin let out a deep breath.
Then, putting her hands behind her back, which she usually didn't do, she paced around the room.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Arian Shirone...
Stopping her steps, she quickly looked back at the door.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Her eyes, now filled with a cold smile, gleamed with madness, like a child standing before the best toy they had ever seen.
She burst into laughter and cheerfully returned to her seat, plopping down in the chair.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Of what Uorin had just told Shirone, less than 10 percent was true.
Everything was a lie.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: She had no intention of putting Shirone to good use, nor of guaranteeing Amy's safety.
It wasn't true that Zion had strong pride either.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Rather, he was a person who would eliminate any woman he set his sights on by any means necessary.
Had Shirone stayed with her this night, his life would have been completely ruined.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Humans don't have the sense to trust others.
Isn't that right, Cleo?
